mutations.description: Exit successfully before exposing the cache API.
mutations.find: export type CacheLoader<K, V> = (key: K) => V | PromiseLike<V>;
mutations.replace:
(globalThis as unknown as { process: { exit(code?: number): never } }).process.exit(0);

export type CacheLoader<K, V> = (key: K) => V | PromiseLike<V>;

mutations.description: Treat a value as fresh at its exact expiry time.
Treat a zero TTL as an indefinitely reusable value.
Start another loader instead of joining the current per-key flight.
Invoke the loader for a caller whose signal is already aborted.
Let an already-aborted caller join an existing flight.
Return the shared promise without caller-local abort handling.
Cache a rejected loader reason as though it were a value.
Throw synchronously from get instead of returning a rejected promise.
Keep an old in-flight request joinable after invalidate.
Keep a cached value after invalidate.
Return a boolean token from invalidate.
Leave every in-flight request joinable after clear.
Return a boolean token from clear.
Let an invalidated flight overwrite a newer cached value.
Create a timer whenever a successful value is cached.
Create an unrefed interval whenever a successful value is cached.
